headline: Microchip (MCHP) Makes Its MPLAB Pro Compilers And ML Suite Free
summary: Microchip Technology (NasdaqGS:MCHP) has made its MPLAB XC Pro Compilers available free of charge. The company has also removed licensing costs for its MPLAB Machine Learning Development Suite. This change opens access to advanced optimization and embedded ML tools for a wider pool of developers. Microchip Technology, a major supplier of microcontrollers and related development tools, sits at the intersection of embedded computing and connected devices. As more products from industrial...

headline: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise Targets
summary: Analysts have lifted their modelled fair value for Microchip Technology from US$86.67 to US$112.96, resetting the price anchor they use to frame the stock. The move comes as research teams weigh the company’s latest disclosures, including the new data center revenue breakout, recent pricing actions, and a wave of higher targets that mix optimism with caution. In the sections ahead, you will see how these shifting price targets fit into the broader Microchip Technology narrative and what to...

headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include Microchip Technology, Semtech, Texas Instruments, Amtech and Vishay Intertechnology
summary: AI infrastructure demand is driving semiconductor opportunities, with five chipmakers highlighted for growth across connectivity, power and advanced packaging.
